name: Square Chalet Plaid Printed Boucle Throw Pillow - Room Essentials™
description:
Add cozy style to your living space with this Square Chalet Plaid Printed Boucle Throw Pillow from Room Essentials™. This 18-inch square pillow showcases a fuzzy boucle surface adorned with a vibrant chalet plaid pattern in warm, inviting colors that complement any seasonal decor. Featuring a soft fabric exterior and a well-filled interior, the decorative pillow adds plenty of comfort and festive style to your sofa, couch, bench or bed.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
